input.command:
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"
LOG="$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log"
OFF=$(cat /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
sleep 4
echo "=== new launcher.log since relaunch ==="
tail -c +$((OFF+1)) "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -25
echo
echo "=== launcher window title ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  set out to ""
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        set out to out & "  - " & (name of w as string) & linefeed
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  if out is "" then return "  (no window yet — launcher may still be initializing)"
  return out
end tell
AS
echo
echo "=== launcher.exe alive? ==="
ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe' | grep -v grep | awk '{print "  pid="$2" cpu="$3"%"}' || echo "  (gone)"
input.description: Confirm launcher auth and window ready
